Who We Are

Nicolás Buján
Founder
NB
The vision behind BUJE is simple: social media should work for you, not rule you.

A creative company shaped by content.

It started on TikTok — learning how attention works, what makes people stop scrolling, and how fast things spread in the digital space. But the longer I stayed in it, the more I saw its other side: the noise, the pressure, the way it pulls people away from what actually matters.

That tension pushed me toward a different kind of work. Not just creating — but building a real digital presence. Strategy, positioning, and direction that helps individuals and businesses of all sizes show up online in a way that feels meaningful, credible, and sustainable.

BUJE exists because the digital space should work for you. Not the other way around. The goal is to use it intentionally — as a tool for real growth, not something that takes over your time, your identity, or your business.
